jobs.title: Senior React Developer
jobs.description: We are looking for a Senior React Developer to build and maintain modern web applications. You will work closely with product and design teams to deliver polished user interfaces, improve performance, and mentor junior developers. Responsibilities include building reusable React components, integrating REST APIs, working with Node.js services, writing clean JavaScript code, and collaborating in an agile team. Strong communication, discipline, ownership, and problem-solving skills are important.
